title: Columbia Asia Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Columbia Asia Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Consultant Physician with drive and ambition, Columbia Asia Advisory Limited in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Columbia Asia Advisory Limited:
Columbia Asia Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia Advisory Limited!
